OSHINOKO_RELIC_PHOTO.title: Photo
OSHINOKO_RELIC_PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, Ruby heals [green]3[/green] HP. For every 1 Shine/Revenge, heal an additional [green]1/3[/green] HP.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_FAMILY_PHOTO.title: Family Photo
OSHINOKO_RELIC_FAMILY_PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, Ruby heals [green]5[/green] HP. For every 1 Shine/Revenge, heal an additional [green]3/4[/green] HP.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.title: Kana Arima's Guidance
OSHINOKO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.description: Gain 1 Shine at the start of each battle.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.flavor: They say she was once a genius child actress who could cry in ten seconds.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_MEM.title: MEM's Management
OSHINOKO_RELIC_MEM.description: Whenever you gain gold, gain 15 additional gold.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_MEM.flavor: A JK-style virtual idol, cheerful and energetic, but hiding a secret when she joined...
OSHINOKO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.title: New B-Komachi
OSHINOKO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.description: Add 1 Code B to your deck.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.flavor: The new B-Komachi formed by Ruby, Kana, and MEM.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.title: Watchful Eye
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.description: Whenever you take damage, heal [green]2[/green] HP.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.flavor: Ruby's brother entered show business for reasons few know. He seems cold and sharp-tongued, but he is actually very kind.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.title: Watchful Eye EX
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.descript: Whenever you take damage, heal [green]4[/green] HP.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.flavor: Ruby's brother entered show business for reasons few know. He seems cold and sharp-tongued, but he is actually very kind.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_SARINA.title: Sarina's Passion
OSHINOKO_RELIC_SARINA.description: At the start of battle, gain 3 Blood-Soaked Petals.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_SARINA.flavor: Even from a hospital room, she always believed the stage would shine.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_AKANE.title: Lover's Support
OSHINOKO_RELIC_AKANE.description: Every 4 turns, double the stacks of your positive effects.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_AKANE.flavor: Feelings that were once cherished continue to echo through battle.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.title: Ai's Hatred
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.description: At the start of battle, apply 1 Trap to everyone.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.flavor: Darkness born from lies will drag even the brightest shine into the abyss.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.title: Ai's Hope
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.description: At the start of battle, gain 1 Intangible.
OSHINOKO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.flavor: It holds Ai's most sincere wish: that Ruby and Aqua can grow up safely and live the lives they truly want.
